allow: Bash(DOCKER_HOST="npipe:////./pipe/podman-machine-default" TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true DEBUG="testcontainers*" node --experimental-vm-modules -e "\(async \(\) => { const { PostgreSqlContainer } = await import\('@testcontainers/postgresql'\); console.log\('Starting...'\); const c = await new PostgreSqlContainer\('postgres:16-alpine'\).withStartupTimeout\(60000\).start\(\); console.log\('URL:', c.getConnectionUri\(\)\); await c.stop\(\); console.log\('Stopped.'\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(DOCKER_HOST="npipe:////./pipe/podman-machine-default" TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true TESTCONTAINERS_HOST_OVERRIDE=localhost DEBUG="testcontainers*" node --experimental-vm-modules -e "\(async \(\) => { const { PostgreSqlContainer } = await import\('@testcontainers/postgresql'\); console.log\('Starting...'\); const c = await new PostgreSqlContainer\('postgres:16-alpine'\).withStartupTimeout\(90000\).start\(\); console.log\('URL:', c.getConnectionUri\(\)\); await c.stop\(\); console.log\('Stopped.'\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
